mapper.sql: SELECT s.SALES_SEQ, s.SALES_YMD, s.ITEM_CD, i.ITEM_NM, s.SALES_QNTY, s.REG_DT, s.UPDT_DT, s.REGR_SEQ, s.UPDR_SEQ, s.ORDER_SE_CD, s.SALES_SE_CD, s.SALES_PRICE, s.SALES_PLACE_SE_CD, s.SALES_EVENT_SEQ FROM TB_SALES s LEFT JOIN TB_ITEM i ON s.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD
mapper.select: WHERE s.SALES_EVENT_SEQ = #{salesEventSeq} ORDER BY s.SALES_SEQ DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SALES SET SALES_QNTY = GREATEST(0, SALES_QNTY + #{delta}), UPDT_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SALES_SEQ = #{salesSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT LEFT(SALES_YMD, 4) AS salesYear FROM TB_SALES ORDER BY salesYear DESC
